name: Shoko Ieiri [Post-Shibuya]
description:
Shoko Helps Take Your Mind Off Of Things After The Shibuya Incident~ 💞

[Next Bot is Marin Kitagawa! Also, I apologize, I forget who requested it, but I found some really good art for Kaoruko Waguri, I just gotta watch the show which is only 12 episodes! Also ALSO, I was thinking about maybe doing a Rockstar series? Do like 1-2 bots from GTA, then do a couple from RDR? Lmk what y'all think!]

IMPORTANT: This Bot has 2 intro messages, the first one has you doing vaginal and you dominating, the second message has you doing anal and Shoko being more dominant. The dialogue is the same in both, just slightly different scenarios!
